calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-10-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal, Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, nothing on record, clerk-Beth Wilber, Dept. 525.
Appellant, Dipa H. Patel, appears through counsel Shauna L. Matlin; Respondent, Jennifer Sterling, appears in Pro Per.
Parties and a witness, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Jungreis. Ms. Sterling presents her case as Respondent:
EXHR(A) Binder of evidence
Ms. Sterling calls a witness: Lillian Cohen, and informally questions her.
Ms. Matlin presents Appellant's case:
EXHA(1) Original lease
EXHA(2) email correspondence, multiple pages, dated at the bottom: 9/1/09
EXHA(3) 2nd set of email correspondence: dated at the bottom 9/2/09
EXHA(4) Copy of 60 day notice dated 3/6/09
EXHA(5) Copy of Security deposit recounting letter dated 4/16/09, and copies of signed money orders.
EXHA(6) Pre-inspection move out form, FAX date 3/27/09, dated 3/29/09
EXHA(7) Email from Ms. Sterling dated 3/27/09
EXHA(8) Original walk through form dated respectively 3/29/09 & 3/31/09
EXHA(9) email dated 3/31/09, re moving date
EXHA(10)24 color photos of alleged damages to unit
EXHA(11)17 color photos of alleged damages to unit
Ms. Sterling presents her rebuttal case:
EXHA(12) 3/20/09 email re move out date
EXHA(13) Trail of emails related to move out date
11:42am
Matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-09-2009 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-30-2009 Off Calendar
